Questions 20-25
For each question, choose the correct answer.
You will hear an interview with a woman called Maggie Taylor, who is talking about garlic.
20 Maggie explains that

options.text: she discovered garlic at university.
you often find garlic in an English kitchen.
people in the older generation don't like garlic.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 4 của test3.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a visit to the dentist.
What does the woman say about the appointment?

options.text: It was earlier than she wanted.
There wasn't a morning one available.
It's with a dentist she prefers.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 11 của test3.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about their evening meal.
What does the man say?

options.text: He'd like pasta.
They always eat takeaways.
He'd prefer a mild curry.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 12 của test3.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a friend's birthday present.
What does the man say about Sandra?

options.text: She doesn't like reading books.
She isn't doing anything on Friday.

She doesn't like surprises.
76

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 13 của test3.

questions.content: What does Mary say about the teachers?

options.text: They are all doing the fun run.
They are training with the children.
They have done the fun run before.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 14 của test3.

questions.content: What does Maggie say about the health benefits of garlic?

options.text: She thinks it can cure the common cold.
It has been used as a medicine for many years.
She has used it to help with a skin condition.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 22 của test3.

questions.content: What does Maggie say about growing garlic?

options.text: she wasn't successful the first time she tried.
she has always had great results.
you shouldn't dig it up while it's still green.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 24 của test3.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a book they've read.
The man

options.text: finished reading it quickly.
thinks the author's other books are more complicated.
suggests trying a different author.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 9 của test3.

questions.content:
You will hear a man telling a friend about a football match.
He thinks

options.text: there will be more people there than usual.
it was difficult to get tickets.
he might get a job selling tickets.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 10 của test3.

questions.content: Maggie says that because of learning about garlic

options.text: she did a cookery course.
she can now cook meals from other countries.
she has travelled all over the world.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 21 của test3.

options.text: garlic from the supermarket is OK to grow in an English garden.
you can grow garlic in any climate.
in the past it was harder to buy suitable garlic to grow in an English garden.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 23 của test3.

options.text: her family like the soup she makes.
her family dislike the smell of garlic.

she doesn't worry what her family think.
78
